Submodules

src.parsers.parser module

parsers.py

Defines the Parser abstract class, a generic interface for parsing a file at a given path into some parsed result type.

class src.parsers.parser.Parser[source]

Bases: ABC, Generic[R]

Abstract base class for file parsers.

Generic over the return type R, the type of the parsed result. Subclasses define how a file at a given path is read and parsed into an instance of R. Each concrete subclass must implement parse().

abstractmethod parse(filepath)[source]

Parse the file at the given path.

Parameters:

filepath (str) – The path to the file to parse.

Returns:

The parsed result.

Return type:

TypeVar(R)

class src.parsers.parser.R

The type of the parsed result returned by Parser.parse().

alias of TypeVar(‘R’)
